channel.title: Seniordesigns on Daniel Johnson
channel.description: Recent content in Seniordesigns on Daniel Johnson

item.title: Nineveh Concepts
item.author: danielrjohnson00@gmail.com (Daniel Johnson)
item.description: Nineveh is KU CS Senior Design Project of team 25: Connor, Jake, Mason, Aidan, and Daniel. This page contains concept art that was made by Aidan throughout the year. Nineveh can be downloaded here Titling and Box Art Story Illustrations Character Portraits Sprite Sheets
